extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by and against each entity: I counted only the Against rows, excluding all By rows. Criminal proceedings against the company, directors, promoters and subsidiary are all Nil (0); statutory/regulatory proceedings against all listed entities are Nil (0); tax proceedings against the company are 16, while the directors’ and promoters’ tax matters are personal and excluded, and the subsidiary has Nil tax proceedings, giving 16. The quantified aggregate amount against the company is ₹43.14 million and the subsidiary has no quantified amount; therefore the group total is ₹43.14 million, or ₹4.314 crore. Contingent liabilities use the stated Total of ₹30.00 million as of March 31, 2024, converted to ₹3.00 crore rather than summing line items. The disclosed concentration percentages relate to Core Markets, apparel, private labels, suppliers and other business measures—not company-wide top-five or top-ten customers; no customer concentration percentage is disclosed. The litigation and contingent-liability tables use ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 10.
